name: MCSB Ontology (Microsoft Cloud Security Benchmark v1)
description: Comprehensive ontology representing the Microsoft Cloud Security Benchmark v1 framework, enabling AI agents to reason about cloud security controls, compliance mappings, implementation guidance, and responsibility assignments across Azure and multi-cloud environments. Acts as governance overlay bridging RCSG security controls to EA architecture domains.

components.ControlDomain: High-level security control category (12 domains: NS, IM, PA, DP, LT, AM, GS, IR, PV, ES, DS, BR)
components.SecurityControl: Specific security control with ID, severity, and security principle
components.ImplementationGuidance: Platform-specific implementation instructions for Azure and AWS
components.ComplianceMapping: Cross-framework control mapping to NIST, CIS, PCI-DSS

crossOntology.name: appliesTo
crossOntology.purpose: MCSB → EA-CORE: Security controls map to enterprise security architecture domains

crossOntology.name: assessesResource
crossOntology.purpose: MCSB → EA-MSFT: Control assessments target specific Azure resources

crossOntology.name: guidanceForPlatform
crossOntology.purpose: MCSB → EA-MSFT: Implementation guidance filtered by cloud platform

versionHistory.changes: Initial creation from MCSB v1 Excel source with 12 control domains, 76 controls, compliance mappings. OAA v5.0.0.

OAA v6.1.0 rebuild: CloudPlatform/CloudService entities removed (now in EA-MSFT). Added 3 cross-ontology bridges to EA-CORE (SecurityArchitecture) and EA-MSFT (AzureResource, CloudPlatform). 8 entities, 12 relationships, 10 business rules, 5 enumerations.

notes: MCSB-ONT is a governance overlay in RCSG-Series. Security controls govern EA architecture — they are not part of EA. Source material preserved in ./source/ directory including v1 ontology, v2 differential analysis, glossary, test data, and validation reports.
